code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{useTranslation}from"../theme/TranslationContext";import CategoryModal from"./CategoryModal";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const categories=[{name:"Salary",icon:"💰"},{name:"Freelance",icon:"🖋️"},{name:"Investment",icon:"📈"},{name:"Gift",icon:"🎁"},{name:"Bonus",icon:"🏆"},{name:"Interest",icon:"🏦"},{name:"Rental",icon:"🏠"},{name:"Dividend",icon:"💵"},{name:"Side Hustle",icon:"🛠️"},{name:"Refund",icon:"🔄"},{name:"Cashback",icon:"💳"},{name:"Commission",icon:"📬"},{name:"Allowance",icon:"🧾"},{name:"Lottery",icon:"🎰"},{name:"Other",icon:"✨"}];const IncomeForm=_ref=>{let{onAddIncome}=_ref;const{t}=useTranslation();const[category,setCategory]=useState("");const[amount,setAmount]=useState("");const[isModalOpen,setIsModalOpen]=useState(false);const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const num=Number(amount);if(!category||!amount||num<=0)return;if(onAddIncome){onAddIncome({category,amount:num});}setCategory("");setAmount("");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"premium-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{fontSize:'1.1rem',marginBottom:'0.5rem'},children:t('addIncome')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"premium-input",style:{textAlign:'left',cursor:'pointer'},onClick:()=>setIsModalOpen(true),children:category||t('selectCategory')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",className:"premium-input",placeholder:t('amount'),value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value),min:"0",step:"0.01",required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"premium-btn success",style:{width:'100%',backgroundColor:'var(--success)'},children:t('addIncome')})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryModal,{isOpen:isModalOpen,onClose:()=>setIsModalOpen(false),categories:categories,onSelectCategory:setCategory})]});};export default IncomeForm;
